name: Yolande's Regal Presence
description: You surround yourself with unearthly majesty for the duration. Whenever you or a creature you choose within 60 feet of you ends its turn, you can force each creature of your choice in that area to make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 4d12 Psychic damage and has the Prone condition. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage only. Cantrip upgrade: The spell's emanation increases to 120 feet when you reach 10th level.
